sections.paragraph:
- Original: Τίμαιος

- Transliteration: Timaios

- Phonetic: tim'-ah-yos

- Definition: Timaeus = "highly prized"

1. the father of the blind man, Bartimaeus

- Origin: probably of Aramaic origin cf H2931

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Probably of Chaldee origin (compare [H2931]); Timoeus (that is Timay) an Israelite: - Timaeus.
